defaults.name: Plains
defaults.description: A small campfire smolders in the center.

type_1.name: Plains
type_1.description: Travelers rest here for the night.

type_3.name: Mountain
type_3.description: The air is thin and cold here.

type_4.name: Road
type_4.description: Wagon ruts cut deep into the path.

type_6.name: Forest

type_8.name: Forest
type_8.description: Tall trees block out most of the light.

type_9.name: Peak
type_9.description: Snow clings to the jagged rock.

type_10.name: Peak
type_10.description: The wind howls violently at this altitude.

type_11.name: Gate
type_11.description: A heavy iron gate stands open.
